title: Trump: ‘We’re going to cut off all trade with Spain’
fullText: NewsFeed“We’re going to cut off all trade with Spain.” Donald Trump targeted Spain in an Oval Office tirade, complaining about Madrid’s refusal to let its bases be used for attacks on Iran. He also joined the German chancellor in saying Spain doesn’t spend enough on its military.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: Donald Trump targeted Spain in an Oval Office tirade, saying he was going "to cut off all trade" with the country.
